change: precompute-K: hoist d*x*y into the table, add_affine_point 10->8 muls, separate-K Vec layout, -kt on negated digits
note: real ~14% win, byte-identical; gain is the arithmetic; separate-K layout slightly better than inline

change: remove the per-call heap Vec in arm64 mul_index by fusing the collect+add loops
note: BIG REGRESSION: batching points into a Vec first helps locality/codegen; fusing destroyed it. one alloc << the batching benefit

change: MEASUREMENT: shared CARGO_TARGET_DIR across git worktrees
note: cargo reuses first worktree build -> baseline and candidate bench the SAME binary, deltas collapse to ~0; ALWAYS per-worktree target dirs
